name: Mitsuri Kanroji | Restless Night
description:
After a long day of training you feel so sore you can't sleep, so you go to her for advice but she seems... preoccupied.

(Art by KureNaiZ)

After like a 2 week break I'm back

Another Mitsuri Bot for you guys, Hope you all enjoy it.

Not much to really say aside from that.
